1: And let my cry come unto thee.
2: Incline thine ear unto me: In the day when when I call answer me speedily.
3: And my bones are burned as an hearth.
4: So that I forget to eat my bread.
5: My bones cleave to my skin.
6: I am like an owl of the desert.
8: And And they that are mad against me are sworn against me.
9: And mingled my drink with weeping,
10: For thou hast lifted me up, and cast me down.
11: And I am withered like grass.
12: And thy remembrance unto all generations.
13: For the time to favour her, yea, the set time, is come.
15: And all the kings of the earth thy glory.
16: He shall appear in his glory.
18: And the people which shall be created shall praise the LORD LORD .
19: From heaven did the LORD LORD behold the earth;
20: To loose those that are appointed to death;
22: And the kingdoms, to serve the LORD LORD .
24: Thy years are are throughout all generations.
25: And the heavens are are the work of thy hands.
26: As a vesture shalt thou change them, and they shall be changed:
27: But thou art art the same, and thy years shall have no end.
28: And their seed shall be established before thee.
